zh.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當James N. Nichols於1637年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登時，他的父親William Nichols38歲，母親Elizabeth Southwick32歲。他於1660年4月與Mary Ann Felt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1694年3月30日在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James N. Nichols于1637年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登时，他的父亲William Nichols38岁，母亲Elizabeth Southwick32岁。他于1660年4月与Mary Ann Felt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1694年3月30日在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nichols
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Nichol , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ); see also below.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Nicholls
meanings: English and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  .

variants.name: Nichol
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). Compare Nickel and Nicol .

In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Greek Nikolas , its variant Nicolas , or of any of various derivatives of the personal name Nikola(o)s ‘Nicholas’, including Nikolis (see Nicoli ). Compare Nicholas and Nicol .

variants.name: Nicols
meanings: English, Scottish, and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  . This surname is rare in the Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James N. Nichols was born in 1637, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, William Nichols, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth Southwick, was 32. He married Mary Ann Felt in April 1660, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 30 March 1694, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James N. Nichols est né en 1637, à Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Nichols, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Southwick, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mary Ann Felt en avril 1660, à Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 30 mars 1694, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: James N. Nicholsが1637年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンで生まれた時，父William Nicholsは38歳，母Elizabeth Southwickは32歳であった。1660年4月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンでMary Ann Feltと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1694年3月30日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든
ko.Malden, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 맬든
ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든
ko.lifeSummary: James N. Nichols(이)가 1637년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Nichols(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Southwick(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1660년 4월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 Mary Ann Felt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1694년 3월 30일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James N. Nichols nasceu em 1637, em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Nichols, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Southwick, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Ann Felt em abril de 1660, em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de março de 1694, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James N. Nichols родился в 1637 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Nichols было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Southwick, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Ann Felt апрель 1660 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 30 марта 1694 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James N. Nichols nació en 1637, en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Nichols, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Southwick, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mary Ann Felt en abril de 1660, en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1694, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
